title: elaeagnus litoralis
intro: Elaeagnus litoralis, also known as beach silverberry or silverberry, is a shrub or small tree native to coastal areas of the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeagnus litoralis include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
